title: Chapter 2 - Adding CSS to Your HTML
description: Quick concept check for adding css to your html.

questions.prompt: Which HTML attribute is used for inline CSS?

explanations.overview: Inline CSS is written with the style attribute.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. Inline CSS is written with the style attribute.
byOptionId.b: Not quite. Inline CSS is written with the style attribute.
byOptionId.c: Correct. Inline CSS is written with the style attribute.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. Inline CSS is written with the style attribute.

questions.prompt: Which tag links an external CSS file?

explanations.overview: Use the link tag in the head to load an external stylesheet.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. Use the link tag in the head to load an external stylesheet.
byOptionId.b: Correct. Use the link tag in the head to load an external stylesheet.
byOptionId.c: Not quite. Use the link tag in the head to load an external stylesheet.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. Use the link tag in the head to load an external stylesheet.
